title: Peltaea speciosa
taxonomy: Peltaea speciosa belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. This classification places Peltaea speciosa within the order Malpighiales, a group of flowering plants that are commonly found in tropical regions. The family Malpighiaceae is a small family of flowering plants that are primarily native to the Americas. Peltaea speciosa is a species of flowering plant that is native to South America. The classification of Peltaea speciosa is further supported by its characteristic leaf and flower structures.
